pain_point: Manual data entry bottlenecks associated with processing complex K-1s and pass-through entity tax documents into tax software like CCH.
draft_email: I noticed in a recent Senior Tax Manager job posting that ASL utilizes CCH Axcess and emphasizes finding candidates who can handle complex multi-state pass-through entities. This usually means your team is burdened with the tedious operational bottleneck of manually parsing hundreds of unstructured K-1s and financial documents to get that data into CCH. CPAAutomation.ai's document parsing engine automatically extracts and formats data from messy tax documents, eliminating manual entry and letting your staff focus entirely on high-value advisory work.
